title: cordula esquirolii
intro: Cordula esquirolii, also known as Cordyceps sinensis, is a type of fungus that belongs to the family Cordycipitaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Cordula esquirolii include improved cardiovascular health, increased endurance, and enhanced immune function. Cordula esquirolii can be prepared in various forms, including capsules, tablets, and tea, as well as in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
